privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for studio_tax_env property_flipper_death_benefit_t2125 task. Discovered a critical defect: the task is entirely missing its required setup scripts (`setup_task.ps1`), export scripts (`export_result.ps1`), evaluation logic (`verifier.py`), and any underlying scenario or data files (`scenario_tremblay_flipper.txt`). Consequently, all taxpayer metadata claims are contradicted or unverified, and the task is fundamentally unscorable.
